fields.description: Frozen ALA snapshot identifier.
fields.name: source_snapshot_id

fields.description: Semantic fingerprint of the source snapshot.
fields.name: source_snapshot_fingerprint

fields.description: Physical SHA-256 of the normalized occurrence artifact.
fields.name: source_occurrence_artifact_sha256

fields.description: ALA data-resource identifier and exact citation join key.
fields.name: data_resource_uid

fields.description: ALA data-resource name.
fields.name: data_resource_name

fields.description: ALA data-provider identifier when supplied on selected rows.
fields.name: data_provider_uid

fields.description: ALA data-provider name when supplied on selected rows.
fields.name: data_provider_name

fields.description: Selected normalized rows from the data resource.
fields.name: selected_record_count

fields.description: ALA citation inventory count for the exact resource UID.
fields.name: citation_record_count

fields.description: Whether citation and selected normalized counts agree.
fields.name: citation_count_matches_selected

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence CC-BY.
fields.name: licence_cc_by_count

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence CC-BY 3.0 (Au).
fields.name: licence_cc_by_3_au_count

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence CC-BY 3.0 (Int).
fields.name: licence_cc_by_3_int_count

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence CC-BY 4.0 (Au).
fields.name: licence_cc_by_4_au_count

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence CC-BY 4.0 (Int).
fields.name: licence_cc_by_4_int_count

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence CC-BY-Int.
fields.name: licence_cc_by_int_count

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence CC0.
fields.name: licence_cc0_count

fields.description: Selected rows with processed licence PDM.
fields.name: licence_pdm_count

fields.description: Provider citation DOI when supplied; not minted by ButterflyLens.
fields.name: doi

fields.description: Exact ALA citation-inventory text for the resource.
fields.name: citation

fields.description: Exact ALA citation-inventory rights text.
fields.name: citation_rights

fields.description: Exact ALA citation-inventory data-generalisation text.
fields.name: data_generalisations

fields.description: Exact ALA citation-inventory information-withheld text.
fields.name: information_withheld

fields.description: Exact ALA citation-inventory download-limit text.
fields.name: download_limit

fields.description: ALA citation-inventory resource information link text.
fields.name: more_information

fields.description: Selected rows marked generalised or alreadyGeneralised by ALA.
fields.name: publicly_generalised_record_count

fields.description: Selected rows eligible for at least the configured coarse aggregate.
fields.name: spatially_eligible_record_count

fields.description: Conservative textual screening flag; not a legal conclusion.
fields.name: citation_restrictive_rights_terms_detected

fields.description: Whether rights/generalisation/withheld/download-limit text is supplied.
fields.name: citation_provider_conditions_present

fields.description: Downstream public-product rights gate based on selected licences and citation text.
fields.name: public_product_rights_review_state

fields.description: SHA-256 of the exact dataset and citation receipt pair.
fields.name: source_dataset_receipt_fingerprint

fields.description: SHA-256 of the dataset semantic row before this field is added.
fields.name: dataset_manifest_fingerprint

invariants: data_resource_uid is unique and rows are sorted by data_resource_uid
every resource has one exact citation entry joined by UID
selected_record_count equals the sum of the closed processed-licence counts
citation rights, generalisation, withheld, and download-limit text are preserved verbatim
restrictive-term screening blocks downstream public-product release but is not a legal conclusion
provider labels and citations are not human verification
